zh.lifeSummary: 當Abigail Lord於大約1615年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾時，她的父親Lord21歲，母親Lord21歲。她於1633年11月9日與Thomas Cave在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1681年1月17日在英國萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓享年67歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abigail Lord于大约1615年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾时，她的父亲Lord21岁，母亲Lord21岁。她于1633年11月9日与Thomas Cave在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1681年1月17日在英国萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓享年67岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾米斯特頓。

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Lord was born about 1615, in Leicestershire, England, her father, Lord, was 21 and her mother, Lord, was 21. She married Thomas Cave on 9 November 1633, in Misterton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 17 January 1681, in Misterton, Leicestershire, England, at the age of 67, and was buried in Misterton, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Abigail Lord est née environ 1615, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Lord, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Lord, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Cave le 9 novembre 1633, à Misterton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 janvier 1681, à Misterton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Misterton, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Abigail Lord um 1615 in Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord 21 und ihre Mutter Lord 21. Sie hat am 9. November 1633 in Misterton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Cave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. Januar 1681 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Misterton, Leicestershire, England und wurde in Misterton, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Lord è nata il circa 1615 nel Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Lord, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Lord, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Cave il 9 novembre 1633, nel Misterton, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 17 gennaio 1681, nel Misterton, Leicestershire, England, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Misterton, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Abigail Lordが約1615年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lordは21歳，母Lordは21歳であった。1633年11月9日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアミステルトンでThomas Caveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1681年1月17日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアミステルトンで67歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアミステルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Lord(이)가 대략 1615년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lord(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1633년 11월 9일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 미스터턴에서 Thomas Cave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1681년 1월 17일 영국 레이스스터실르 미스터턴에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 미스터턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Lord nasceu aproximadamente 1615, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Lord, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Cave em 9 de novembro de 1633, em Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 17 de janeiro de 1681, em Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Lord родилась около 1615 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Lord было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Lord, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Cave 9 ноября 1633 г. в местности мистиртон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 17 января 1681 г. в местности мистиртон, лисестиршир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности мистиртон, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Abigail Lord nació aproximadamente 1615, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Lord, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Thomas Cave el 9 de noviembre de 1633, en Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 17 de enero de 1681, en Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Misterton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
